entries.name: tauri-build
entries.intent: Build production Tauri 2.x bundles (msi/nsis/dmg/appimage/deb) with signing config

entries.name: tauri-capability
entries.intent: Author or audit a Tauri 2.x capability JSON for capability-based ACL permissions

entries.name: tauri-dev
entries.intent: Start the Tauri 2.x dev loop with frontend HMR and Rust hot reload

entries.name: tauri-ipc
entries.intent: Generate a Tauri 2.x IPC command (Rust handler + TypeScript invoke wrapper + shared types)

entries.name: tauri-scaffold
entries.intent: Bootstrap a new Tauri 2.x desktop app with Next.js 15 shell, Stronghold/log plugins, and capability files
